name: workflow
description: An autonomous dev loop plus context management: /orchestrate runs N rounds of parallel issue-solving (sonnet implementers in isolated git worktrees, a sonnet merger that merges in dependency order and resolves conflicts under the done-check, then a fable reviewer files blocking follow-up issues), and a threshold-driven watchdog drives deliberate, early /clear and /handoff as the window fills, auto-resuming the in-flight plan.
